key.name: enable-custom-names
key.description: If true, the extension will display custom names from the workspace-names array instead of default Workspace N names.

key.name: workspace-names
key.description: Array of workspace names where index 0 corresponds to workspace 1, index 1 to workspace 2, etc.

key.name: panel-box
key.description: Which panel box to place the indicator in: 'left', 'center', or 'right'.

key.name: panel-position
key.summary: Position index in the panel box
key.description: Index position within the chosen panel box (0 = start).
